data.title: Georgia-Pacific Names Ryan Elwart, Senior Vice President - Sales and Innovation, GP Foodservice Solutions
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Georgia-Pacific revealed the appointment of Ryan Elwart as the senior vice president of sales and innovation for GP Foodservice Solutions, encompassing Dixie® and Anchor Packaging. Elwart will take charge of this new business segment, overseeing the sales strategies and innovations.

data.title: Linkhome Holdings Inc. Signs MOU to Acquire Mortgage One Group, Accelerating Nationwide Expansion of AI Real Estate & Fintech Platform
data.description: Irvine, CA - April 28, 2026 - Linkhome Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LHAI), an AI-based real estate and fintech platform, revealed its plan to purchase 100% of Mortgage One Group, a comprehensive direct mortgage lender. The Company signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for this acquisition.

data.title: The Province of Chubut Announces Amounts Tendered for its U.S. Dollar Step Up Notes due 2030 and Aggregate Principal Amount of Tenders Accepted for Purchase
data.description: In Chubut, Argentina, on April 28, 2026, officials revealed that on April 27, 2026, the Province of Chubut disclosed the total principal sum of notes, as detailed in the table, that have successfully been tendered and approved for acquisition under its program.

data.title: Bemis Associates Appoints Christina Chen as President and Chief Operating Officer
data.description: Today, in Shirley, Massachusetts, on April 28, 2026, Bemis Associates, Inc. declared Christina Chen as their new President and Chief Operating Officer. Bemis, a prominent player in bonding and material innovation on a global scale, has chosen Chen to take on these key roles within the company. Christina Chen's appointment comes as part of an effort to drive growth and strategic direction at Bemis Associates.

data.title: "MONTHLY CAPITAL INTEL" PREMIERES APRIL 28 ON 2WAY, KICKING OFF NEW LIVE INTERACTIVE POLLING FRANCHISE
data.description: A brand new program led by Mark Penn and Mark Halperin is set to debut, featuring a unique format combining real-time data, expert insights, and audience engagement. The polling for the show will be conducted by HarrisX, a highly reputable political polling and public opinion research firm. Scheduled to kick off in New York on April 28, 2026, this venture promises to enhance viewers' understanding of current events with accurate information and interactive elements.

data.title: Decisions of the Meeting of Shareholders of AB Pieno žvaigždės
data.description: The regular annual meeting of shareholders of AB "Pieno žvaigždės" occurred on April 28, 2026, at 11:00.

data.title: Deluxe and MRI Software Partner to Enhance Payment Capabilities for Property Management Companies
data.description: In Minneapolis, Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a reputable Payments and Data firm, revealed a new partnership with MRI Software, a top player in real estate solutions with a client base of over 45,000 in 170 nations. Deluxe was selected by MRI as the primary processing partner for its rent payment solution. This decision was based on Deluxe's capacity to streamline large-scale payment operations and improve current services for residential and commercial property management customers.

data.title: DAS Technology Integrates with Tekion to Enhance Connectivity Across the Automotive Ecosystem
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, AI-native Customer Data and Experience Platform provider DAS Technology has revealed a new partnership with Tekion. Tekion, known for its end-to-end, AI-native cloud platform for automotive retail, will integrate with DAS Technology to expand the connected partner ecosystem in Tekion's Automotive Partner Cloud (APC). This collaboration is set to boost operational efficiency by improving data exchange. This move is expected to benefit automotive retailers by streamlining processes and enhancing connectivity.

data.title: MPLX LP Announces Quarterly Distribution
data.description: The board of directors of the general partner of MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX) in Findlay, Ohio, announced a quarterly cash distribution of $1.0765 per common unit for Q1 2026, totaling $4.31 annually. Shareholders are set to receive the distribution in May.
